channel.title: vansecoo TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from vansecoo

item.title: Song I sang most this year— & fave song ever by Olivia. posting my drafts because life’s too short🧚🏼✨🦋 Enough for you - @Olivia Rodrigo
item.description: Song I sang most this year— & fave song ever by Olivia. posting my drafts because life’s too short🧚🏼✨🦋 Enough for you - @Olivia Rodrigo
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: When in PR✨🥹 (bts of our content day) I miss my beautiful people.. Next group shuffle trip loading and holyyyyyt shit I’m so excited to let you know what we got cooking!!! ✨✨✨ #shuffle #shuffledance #footwork #puertorico Choreo by meeee
item.description: When in PR✨🥹 (bts of our content day) I miss my beautiful people.. Next group shuffle trip loading and holyyyyyt shit I’m so excited to let you know what we got cooking!!! ✨✨✨ #shuffle #shuffledance #footwork #puertorico Choreo by meeee
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: IM GETTING BETTER ITS OKAY, but boy was I fighting past some pain last night💪🏽 thank yall so much for tuning in on my live and hanging with us !! 😅🥹😭✨ Come dance with us every Monday night at @MDC DANCE COMPLEX in studio city!! 8:30pm!!! Bday class next
item.description: IM GETTING BETTER ITS OKAY, but boy was I fighting past some pain last night💪🏽 thank yall so much for tuning in on my live and hanging with us !! 😅🥹😭✨ Come dance with us every Monday night at @MDC DANCE COMPLEX in studio city!! 8:30pm!!! Bday class next
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Wanna learn how to shuffle at @FitExpo ?!😍 Catch my shuffle class TOMORRROOOW Sunday at the “Training and Wellness Zone” at 12:30pm!! Come learn how to shuffle with me and my amazing shuffle crew!🔥 (When you enter the convention it’s on the far left back
item.description: Wanna learn how to shuffle at @FitExpo ?!😍 Catch my shuffle class TOMORRROOOW Sunday at the “Training and Wellness Zone” at 12:30pm!! Come learn how to shuffle with me and my amazing shuffle crew!🔥 (When you enter the convention it’s on the far left back
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Running into this next decade of my life like I’m running into the most delicious looking Caribbean turquoise blue ocean water🐬🌊🫧 Gonna drench myself in words unspoken, and live this life with arms SOOO MF WIDE OPEN🦋 Thank you guys for a decade filled wi
item.description: Running into this next decade of my life like I’m running into the most delicious looking Caribbean turquoise blue ocean water🐬🌊🫧 Gonna drench myself in words unspoken, and live this life with arms SOOO MF WIDE OPEN🦋 Thank you guys for a decade filled wi
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Had the most special birthday yesterday. Thank you guys so fucking much for everything. To my @MDC DANCE COMPLEX shuffle family, you guys have brought an abundance of light into my life this whole last year. I can’t wait to keep growing with you. Never g
item.description: Had the most special birthday yesterday. Thank you guys so fucking much for everything. To my @MDC DANCE COMPLEX shuffle family, you guys have brought an abundance of light into my life this whole last year. I can’t wait to keep growing with you. Never g
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Wait for it🥵 double trouble at @FitExpo last weekend, we had ourselves a timeee🫶🏽 Van b2b @tgirldern 🦋🦋🦋🦋🦋🦋 Did you know we’re throwing an ALL SHUFFLE CONVENTION MY BEAUTIFUL PEOPLE!! 🪐 @shuffleverse <—— Join us this upcoming April 24th-27th, 2026– for t

item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Toniiight!!! Team Seco - I hope to see you all there! 🤍🤍
item.description: Toniiight!!! Team Seco - I hope to see you all there! 🤍🤍
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: The first ALL shuffle dance convention in the world… this April 24-27, in Los Angeles California!🌞 Comment SHUFFLEVERSE if yall are interested and I’ll send you details! Inspo- @gillytheanswer you’re hilarious #shuffle #shuffledance #cuttingshapes #nobe
item.description: The first ALL shuffle dance convention in the world… this April 24-27, in Los Angeles California!🌞 Comment SHUFFLEVERSE if yall are interested and I’ll send you details! Inspo- @gillytheanswer you’re hilarious #shuffle #shuffledance #cuttingshapes #nobe
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Thank you guys for the love on my pump up the jam video— thank you also for 3M followers!!! I love you guys. 10 years of doing this dance style and it will never get old!! Stay tuned for much more dancing, music, EXPRESSION, and passion! Thank you🦋🫶🏽✨
item.description: Thank you guys for the love on my pump up the jam video— thank you also for 3M followers!!! I love you guys. 10 years of doing this dance style and it will never get old!! Stay tuned for much more dancing, music, EXPRESSION, and passion! Thank you🦋🫶🏽✨
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: @shuffleverse — The most anticipated event of the YEAR for aspiring shufflers AND seasoned shufflers coming from all over the world!! Join us for a weekend filled with growth and community. April 24-27th, 2026! Convention days: April 24-26 Closing rave pa
item.description: @shuffleverse — The most anticipated event of the YEAR for aspiring shufflers AND seasoned shufflers coming from all over the world!! Join us for a weekend filled with growth and community. April 24-27th, 2026! Convention days: April 24-26 Closing rave pa
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: I actually shot this freestyle before I even created my choreography for class..🦋🦋🦋 miss the freestyle days!! My beautiful peopleeee— I think I want to join the ‘shuffle for 70 days challenge’… hmmm that way I’ll shuffle every mother freaking day before @
item.description: I actually shot this freestyle before I even created my choreography for class..🦋🦋🦋 miss the freestyle days!! My beautiful peopleeee— I think I want to join the ‘shuffle for 70 days challenge’… hmmm that way I’ll shuffle every mother freaking day before @
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: where do we go when the lights go oooouut?!🌑✨🥵 @Charley McGarry X VANSECOO when two 96’ capricorns from London and Miami get together… it’s 50 takes, perfectionism galore, we can go until failure, and we quite literally don’t get tired or complain or giv
item.description: where do we go when the lights go oooouut?!🌑✨🥵 @Charley McGarry X VANSECOO when two 96’ capricorns from London and Miami get together… it’s 50 takes, perfectionism galore, we can go until failure, and we quite literally don’t get tired or complain or giv
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Oooh, you gotta get down 🦋🥵😝 @Adam Morales 💙🦈 @Juliana Ungaro @Carlyy @Sharissa K #bruno #ijustmight

item.title: who am I kidding- i sweat buckets over ANY little thing!! lol My beautiful PEOPLEEE‼️🚨 we are sooooo so so freaking close to the ShuffleVerse Dance Convention 2026! Almost 2 months away till we’re dancing in Los Angeles together for 4 days straight🌴🌞 - 3
item.description: who am I kidding- i sweat buckets over ANY little thing!! lol My beautiful PEOPLEEE‼️🚨 we are sooooo so so freaking close to the ShuffleVerse Dance Convention 2026! Almost 2 months away till we’re dancing in Los Angeles together for 4 days straight🌴🌞 - 3
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: The vibes at @305 Fitness in nyc were everythingggg🤌🏽✨😭 Thank you guys so much for having me🫶🏽 Also thank you @Chris J. Gonzales and @britmeetsworld2.0 for sharing this dance with me, truly one of my favorite choreos I’ve ever created, and having my shuff
item.description: The vibes at @305 Fitness in nyc were everythingggg🤌🏽✨😭 Thank you guys so much for having me🫶🏽 Also thank you @Chris J. Gonzales and @britmeetsworld2.0 for sharing this dance with me, truly one of my favorite choreos I’ve ever created, and having my shuff
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: You comin or what?!😝 @shuffleverse family is waiting to welcome you with open arms🦋 Ever wanted to learn how to shuffle for 3 days straight, rave with a bunch of awesome dancers, and then set out to the streets to shoot content out in the most iconic part
item.description: You comin or what?!😝 @shuffleverse family is waiting to welcome you with open arms🦋 Ever wanted to learn how to shuffle for 3 days straight, rave with a bunch of awesome dancers, and then set out to the streets to shoot content out in the most iconic part
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: New fear unlocked ☠️ DROPS THIS THURSDAY- IM SO EXCITED @screammovies #Scream7Movie #shuffle #footwork
item.description: New fear unlocked ☠️ DROPS THIS THURSDAY- IM SO EXCITED @screammovies #Scream7Movie #shuffle #footwork
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: Happy frickin Monday and happy 60 days until THE @shuffleverse dance convention 2026!!🦋 Words cannot describe how excited I am to bring together beautiful humans from all over the world for 4 days of nonstop shuffle training, shuffle classes, and shuffle
item.description: Happy frickin Monday and happy 60 days until THE @shuffleverse dance convention 2026!!🦋 Words cannot describe how excited I am to bring together beautiful humans from all over the world for 4 days of nonstop shuffle training, shuffle classes, and shuffle
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: ITS HAPPENING- ITS HAPPENING- ITS FRICKIN HAPPENING!🦋🪐✨🥵 We’ll see you in Los Angeles this April 24-27 at @shuffleverse 2026! Where shuffling becomes accessible, achievable, and possible for anyone and everyone ready to learn and enjoy. We are so pumped t
item.description: ITS HAPPENING- ITS HAPPENING- ITS FRICKIN HAPPENING!🦋🪐✨🥵 We’ll see you in Los Angeles this April 24-27 at @shuffleverse 2026! Where shuffling becomes accessible, achievable, and possible for anyone and everyone ready to learn and enjoy. We are so pumped t
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: 55 more days till @shuffleverse — are we so freaking excited for THE mother frickin shuffle event of the YEAAAR my beautiful people?!? 😍🥵😝 It’s not every day you get 10 world renowned shuffle instructors under one roof, 3 days of classes, 30+ shuffle work
item.description: 55 more days till @shuffleverse — are we so freaking excited for THE mother frickin shuffle event of the YEAAAR my beautiful people?!? 😍🥵😝 It’s not every day you get 10 world renowned shuffle instructors under one roof, 3 days of classes, 30+ shuffle work
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: while your feet are stompin’🥵🥵🥵 Always an honor, pleasure, & absolute MF blessing to get to dance alongside my biggest dance inspiration, and Colombian brother @yai_ariza 🔥 TE AMOOOO MOCOSOOO, sigue dándola TODA que nos inspiras y motivas a todos🧚🏼 eres g
item.description: while your feet are stompin’🥵🥵🥵 Always an honor, pleasure, & absolute MF blessing to get to dance alongside my biggest dance inspiration, and Colombian brother @yai_ariza 🔥 TE AMOOOO MOCOSOOO, sigue dándola TODA que nos inspiras y motivas a todos🧚🏼 eres g
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: where words fail, music speaks… 🦋🪶 I seriously can’t thank you guys enough for the love on absolutely everything recently. I have so many intro/get-to-know-me posts I still have to get to… there are so many layers to my universe that go way beyond just da
item.description: where words fail, music speaks… 🦋🪶 I seriously can’t thank you guys enough for the love on absolutely everything recently. I have so many intro/get-to-know-me posts I still have to get to… there are so many layers to my universe that go way beyond just da
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: I HAVE A CONFESSION: I THINK IM IN LOVE WITH BEEEELE😫😫🌴🌴🌊🌊 New fave dance trend ‼️🔥 @BEÉLE #estrellafugaz #footwork #afro Dc: @Kendry🐺 🔥🔥🔥
item.description: I HAVE A CONFESSION: I THINK IM IN LOVE WITH BEEEELE😫😫🌴🌴🌊🌊 New fave dance trend ‼️🔥 @BEÉLE #estrellafugaz #footwork #afro Dc: @Kendry🐺 🔥🔥🔥
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: If you like this type of footwork you should really check out my shuffle convention im throwing in LA this upcoming january 2024! Come immerse yourself in shuffle culture from some of the top shuffle instructors in the world, prepare to be enlightened ✨🫶🏽
item.description: If you like this type of footwork you should really check out my shuffle convention im throwing in LA this upcoming january 2024! Come immerse yourself in shuffle culture from some of the top shuffle instructors in the world, prepare to be enlightened ✨🫶🏽
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: I can’t believe my annual @shuffleverse dance convention is dropping soon!! 2026 lineup is crazyyy, stay tuned if you wanna learn how to dance like this!✨ Round 2 of this choreo next Mondayyyyy!!! You comin’!? If you haven’t yet come by and gotten a taste
item.description: I can’t believe my annual @shuffleverse dance convention is dropping soon!! 2026 lineup is crazyyy, stay tuned if you wanna learn how to dance like this!✨ Round 2 of this choreo next Mondayyyyy!!! You comin’!? If you haven’t yet come by and gotten a taste
item.author: vansecoo

item.title: THE BIGGEST shuffle event of the year is coming to Los Angeles. From super beginners to advanced shufflers—this weekend is about LOVE, dance, community & growth 🤍🦋 If you’ve always wanted to learn how to shuffle… this is your calling, this is your chance!
item.description: THE BIGGEST shuffle event of the year is coming to Los Angeles. From super beginners to advanced shufflers—this weekend is about LOVE, dance, community & growth 🤍🦋 If you’ve always wanted to learn how to shuffle… this is your calling, this is your chance!
item.author: vansecoo
